title: Raising Kids in the Digital Age ~Smartphones and Children~
description: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!

scenes.speech: Let's explore the correct approach to raising kids in the digital age together!
scenes.title: Raising Kids in the Digital Age ~Smartphones and Children~

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Characteristics of the Digital Native Generation
scenes.content: Children born after 2010, known as 'Generation Alpha,' grow up in an environment where smartphones are the norm. Social media, videos, and games are integrated into their lives - this generation requires a completely different approach to parenting!
scenes.highlight: Generation Alpha: born 2010 and later. By 2025, there will be 2 billion people. The largest generation in history.

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Appropriate Management of Screen Time
scenes.content: WHO recommended: 0-1 years old = 0 minutes, 2-5 years old = 1 hour/day. The American Academy of Pediatrics also recommends no device use 1 hour before bedtime. The key is not 'prohibition' but 'managing time and content'!
scenes.highlight: Children with screen time over 2 hours: sleep, attention, and emotional problems tend to occur (multiple studies)

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Programming Education is 'Future Literacy'
scenes.content: Programming education became mandatory in Japanese elementary schools in 2020. Programming is not just a technical skill, but also fosters 'logical thinking, problem-solving, and creativity.' You can start with Scratch and Minecraft!
scenes.highlight: Programming thinking: breaking down problems into smaller parts and solving them → useful in all fields

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Protecting Children from Online Dangers
scenes.content: Risks children face online: ① personal information leakage, ② dating apps and sexual content, ③ cyberbullying, ④ gaming and excessive spending. Both 'protective filters' and 'parent-child dialogue' are crucial!
scenes.highlight: Cyberbullying damage: about 17% of elementary, middle, and high school students experience it (MEXT survey 2022)

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Healthy YouTube Habits
scenes.content: It's unrealistic to completely ban YouTube. Watching together and having conversations like 'why do you like this video?' and 'is this real?' is important. Let's foster media literacy!
scenes.highlight: Media literacy education: in Finland, they teach how to spot fake news from elementary school

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Healthy Relationships with SNS
scenes.content: Many children start using SNS at 12-13 years old. Instagram and TikTok can create problems like 'comparison,' 'self-esteem,' and 'FOMO (fear of missing out).' Teaching 'what you see on SNS is just the highlight reel' is crucial.
scenes.highlight: SNS usage and youth mental health: correlated with increased depression, anxiety, and low self-esteem

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: What is Gaming Disorder?
scenes.content: The WHO recognized 'gaming disorder' as a disease (2019). Signs: ① prioritizing gaming over daily life, ② loss of control, ③ continuing despite negative effects. Setting rules and promoting offline activities can help prevent it!
scenes.highlight: Gaming disorder prevalence: about 3-5% of Japanese middle and high school students are at 'problematic' levels

scenes.speech: Let's learn about raising kids in the digital age with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Supporting Parenting with Technology
scenes.content: Digital technology can be an ally in parenting, not an enemy. Apps for sleep management, e-book reading, location sharing, and video calls with grandparents can improve parenting quality!
scenes.highlight: Parenting app usage: digital support for breastfeeding, sleep records, and developmental checks can reduce parental burden

scenes.speech: I've learned about raising kids in the digital age! Next, let's explore local revitalization and parenting 🎉
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
